event.title: I Love Free Software Day in Caltanissetta, Italia

body.p: It is the "I Love Free Software Day", following the Coordinators meeting, in our case in Caltanissetta, in our site.

Date and hour is indicated in the form, there is not registration for the event itself. However, as it is in a school, in curricular hours, other external partecipants should indicate their partecipation first, on time (at least some days before the event).

Myself (Francesco), will manage the event with Michele, who is the deputy head of the school.
The speech will be done by myself.
